# sakura_apprun_dedicated_worker_nodes (Data Source)

List of worker nodes in an AppRun dedicated auto scaling group

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sakura_apprun_dedicated_cluster" "main" {
  name = "ExampleCluster"
}

data "sakura_apprun_dedicated_auto_scaling_group" "main" {
  cluster_id = data.sakura_apprun_dedicated_cluster.main.id
  id         = "A5F8D577-7395-4EB4-83D9-AC60A1EF2C5B"
}

data "sakura_apprun_dedicated_worker_nodes" "main" {
  cluster_id            = data.sakura_apprun_dedicated_cluster.main.id
  auto_scaling_group_id = data.sakura_apprun_dedicated_auto_scaling_group.main.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `auto_scaling_group_id` (String) The auto scaling group ID that the worker_nodes belongs to
- `cluster_id` (String) The cluster ID that the worker_nodes belongs to

### Read-Only

- `nodes` (Attributes List) List of worker nodes (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nodes))

<a id="nestedatt--nodes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nodes`

Optional:

- `id` (String) The ID of the worker_nodes.
- `resource_id` (String) The ID of the worker_nodes.

Read-Only:

- `archive_version` (String) The archive version
- `create_error_message` (String) The error message if creation failed
- `created` (String) The creation time of the worker node
- `creating` (Boolean) Whether the worker node is being created
- `draining` (Boolean) Whether the worker node is draining
- `healthy` (Boolean) Whether the worker node is healthy
- `network_interfaces` (Attributes List) The network interfaces of the worker node (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nodes--network_interfaces))
- `running_containers` (Attributes List) The list of running containers on the worker node (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nodes--running_containers))
- `status` (String) The status of the worker node

<a id="nestedatt--nodes--network_interfaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nodes.network_interfaces`

Read-Only:

- `addresses` (Set of String) The IP address(es) assigned to this interface
- `interface_index` (Number) The interface index


<a id="nestedatt--nodes--running_containers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nodes.running_containers`

Read-Only:

- `application_id` (String) The ID of the application that the worker node belongs to
- `application_version` (Number) The application's version
- `container_id` (String) The container ID
- `image` (String) The container image
- `name` (String) The container name
- `started_at` (String) The container start time
- `state` (String) The container state
- `status` (String) The container status
